Grangeville, Idaho.-The Grange
ville-Meadows stage went over an en-
bankment and six persons were in
jured.


Rossland, b. C.-Unknown incen-
diaries set fire to four buildings last
night within three hours. The build
ings were small but in the center of
the city.


Taooma.-The strike situation is
intensified by six members of the con-
tractors association withdrawing dis
elimination against the members of
the trades council


kendrtck. Idaho.-This city NAV
have a $500 cannery If the offer of
the Hastings Industrial company to
establish one here on a stakeholder
basis Is accepted.

Portland, ore.-Doped by morphine
Harry Randolph went to sleep on the
Northern Pacific tracks and suffered
| only broken wrist when the next
| train came along and helped him of
| the rails.

| Boise, Idaho.-Senator w. A. Clarl
has filed application for the diversion
of water from Shoshone Falls. which


is taken as an indication that the

power plant there.
